This form was created on 7/13/2020 using the previous U006 pdf's as reference.

The 2.4.2.0 configuration was tested and verified to match this document by JB.

U006 is the original configuration (keyset) for UPS.  U006_2 was added as a configuration at a later date as UPS wanted a separate keyset for China offices.  When this_2 was added, we retroactively labelled U006 as U006_1 ...so U006 is the same as U006_1

U006 also has a custom EV2 Honeywell Application
